spec.precondition: requires valid(galloc) && valid(t) && t != NULL && galloc != NULL
spec.postcondition: (ensures (result == true) iff (t is owned/managed by galloc and will be allocated by galloc) && (result == false) implies (t->data is external to galloc's management or t is not managed by galloc)) && (result == ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, t)->allocated)

ggml_gallocr_hash_get.precondition: requires valid(galloc) && valid(t) && valid(galloc->hash_set.keys) && valid(galloc->hash_values) && galloc->hash_set.size > 0 && valid_range(galloc->hash_values, 0, galloc->hash_set.size)
ggml_gallocr_hash_get.postcondition: (ensures valid(result) && result != NULL && result == &galloc->hash_values[i] where i < galloc->hash_set.size && result->buffer_id >= -1 && result->n_views >= 0 && result->n_children >= 0 && valid(result->addr) && result can be safely read and written) && (result == &galloc->hash_values[ggml_hash_find_or_insert(&galloc->hash_set, t)])
